name: degoog-searxng-extensions
description: SearXNG integration for degoog — access 242+ search engines through your own SearXNG instance.
author: SiaoZeng

engines.name: SearXNG
engines.description: Connects degoog to a SearXNG instance, giving access to 242+ search engines (Google, DuckDuckGo, Brave, arXiv, PubMed, HuggingFace, npm, crates.io, and more) via SearXNG's JSON API.
